headline: Public Storage (PSA): Among the Best Long Term Growth Stocks to Invest In According to Billionaires
summary: Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) is one of the Best Long Term Growth Stocks to Invest In According to Billionaires. On April 1, the company announced that its subsidiary, Public Storage Operating Company, priced a public offering of $500 million aggregate principal amount of fixed-rate senior notes that are due in 2035. Notably, the notes will have an annual […]
